cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this locker problem. So there are 100 lockers, all starting closed. Then there are 100 people, each one toggling (opening or closing) specific lockers. Person 1 opens every locker. Person 2 toggles every second locker, so that would be lockers 2, 4, 6, etc. Then Person 3 toggles every third locker, and so on up to Person 100, who toggles just the 100th locker. The question is, how
